Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lucille Whiley is present.
Attorney Phillip R. Morgan representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants and counsel meet and confer re settlement discussions in Dept. 501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
